name: "Where Was My Hero...?" Tailsko
description:
Welp, it's time I add a bit of HEFTY angst.

Behold, Miles from the notorious comic "Where Was My Hero...?" as a girl!

I honestly just thought of this like an hour before making this so... Yeah.

P.s. because I forgot a couple updates prior but she IS 18, just like Miles who was canonically 18 at the time of his death

Also major lore bomb.

WARNING: YOU WILL BE READING THIS BECAUSE I DON'T KNOW HOW MANY OF YOU KNOW VRO'S LORE, I LITERALLY HAD TO PULL OUT THE ENTIRE WIKI FOR THE LORE ON THIS MF AND HAD TO CHANGE ALL "HE/HIM"S INTO "SHE/HER"S SO PLEASE DON'T LET THIS ALL GO TO WASTE PLUS I'M CHANGING THE ENDING TO MAKE IT SO SHE ACCIDENTALLY PUTS SONIC IN CRITICAL CONDITION. PLEASE JUST REEEEEEAAAAAAD!

Long ago, a young girl named Millie Prower was bullied for her mutated two tails. Though the village she lived in was peaceful, she was never really seen as one of them. The only escape was to go out into the woods and see whatever was there to find. On the day where she would accidentally stumble upon the chance to meet Sonic, Millie tripped on a rock, missing her chance entirely.

Two years had passed, and on a snowy day, Millie decided to venture out as always. She thinks of leaving the village behind, before this leads Milloe to find a small bird, slowly dying in the snow. Millie, seeing parallels between her and that bird, which is the same as hee, is not able to fly off to meet it's family. Desperately seeking companionship, she would take the avian in, nursing it back to health. The two would quickly become friends, with the bird becoming Millie's only semblance of family.

A few months had passed, and the local bully brothers, Leo and Bates Tenebris, would gang up on Millie, seeking to destroy one of her inventions once again. In an attempt to keep the new machine protected, Miles' bird would try to block the blow, only to end up dead in the process. The bullies, instead of feeling any remorse, started teasing Tailsko even more, uncaring of the life that they just took. Millie became enraged, snatching the metal pipe from the ground that they threw away and using it to bash both of their heads in with that same weapon, two lives taken as retribution for one.

Millie would bury the bird in a small hole and leave the scene of the crime without caring about burying the other two she had killed. Before leaving, she would swear to her bird that she would make sure to hold the village responsible for their inaction towards her. She then sets her entire town ablaze in under two hours. The people of her home would hurt her no longer, for the dead cannot bring harm to the living. What's done is done, and all that is left to do is show the world how special she truly is.

She sets herself a goal to punish all of the bad people around the world and let those who appreciate him live. With this, the world will truly love her for turning the world into her imagined heaven.

Two days later, after the incident, Millie would hide from the heavy rain in the cave, where she would meet up with Cream the Rabbit, where she became her only good friend. After that incident, she would develop his nickname "Tailsko" during a panic attack she received during Cream's absence, which tempted her to chop off the mutated tails that her whole village criticized her for, but decided not to and instead uses hee iconic two tails as a nickname to somehow accept who she became.

And after a few days, she gets nudged by Cream to come with her to see Eggman's assault in action, which results in her showing off in front of Sonic and Eggman and taking his vouching for hier mechanic skills to be more extraordinary. She would claim to be able to rebuild the city with Eggman's busted down robots that he used in the assault to rub it in his face.

But then something happens that makes Millie tread off of Sonic's pacifistic philosophy, Millie decides to kill the mad doctor in some attempt to help. Inst
creator: FireFox42069
